description: Wild domain injection brainstorming engine. Inject 17 remote domains (hydrothermal vents, monasteries, bee dances, Bushmen, casinos, classical music, immune system, alchemy, polar expeditions) + random Mao seeds + random Chinese character web search as concrete 'nails'. Juxtapose nails directly against user-domain 'counterparts'. Zero abstraction. Dual gate: comfort check + web verification.
author: liwenyu2002
